variants.title: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHLP31167 DIN Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 20250H20XLA000P
variants.option1Value: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHLP31167 DIN Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 20250H20XLA000P
variants.description: The MICROFIT® UltraGen III MFHLP31167 is the MICROFIT® approved replacement to the Eppensteiner 20250H20XLA000P. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHLP31167 is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of OEM quality standards, ensuring superior filtration performance and the longest possible filter life. Building on over 50 years of filtration expertise, the UltraGen III series is the third generation of MICROFIT® filter media, delivering exceptional efficiency and reliability. FilterFinder is an approved distributor of MICROFIT® filters. With expert product knowledge, dedicated support, and a large stock availability, FilterFinder ensures you receive the parts you need when you need them, every time.
specifications: Style: DIN Pressure Filter, Media: Glass Fiber, Efficiency 1: 20µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 22µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 78.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 40.5 mm, Length: 248.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 21 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 20µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 21 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: HiFi Filter SH 65423 DIN Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 20250H20XLA000P
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SH 65423 DIN Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 20250H20XLA000P
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 65423 Hydraulic Filter. Engineered to protect and optimize the performance of hydraulic systems, this filter delivers exceptional contamination control. Premium filter media captures fine particles and debris that could compromise system integrity, helping to extend the lifespan of critical hydraulic components. By maintaining fluid cleanliness, it reduces wear and tear while supporting consistent pressure levels throughout the system. Perfect for a wide range of hydraulic applications—from industrial machinery to heavy-duty equipment—this filter provides reliable performance even under high-pressure conditions. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, helping to minimize downtime and maintenance costs while maximizing operational efficiency.

Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the XD250G25A provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.

variants.title: Fleetguard ST2125 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the Eppensteiner 20250H20XLA000P
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard ST2125 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the Eppensteiner 20250H20XLA000P
variants.description: Fleetguard® ST2125 hydraulic cartridge filter with synthetic media is designed to help keep your precision hydraulic systems running as intended, providing a solution for various applications.  This filter meets or exceeds the equipment OEM quality and performance and is the first aftermarket replacement available on the market today, bringing your operation top-quality performance and an overall unbeatable total cost of ownership.
